targets.rawSql: SELECT reason, cnt FROM (SELECT ifNull(quarantine_reason, 'UNKNOWN') AS reason, count() AS cnt FROM network_health.silver_dlq_quarantine_src WHERE quarantined_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY reason UNION ALL SELECT 'NO_DQ_EVENTS' AS reason, 0 AS cnt) ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT toFloat64(countIf(quarantine_reason = 'ORPHANED_DEVICE')) / greatest(toFloat64(count()), 1.0) * 100 AS orphan_rate_pct FROM network_health.silver_dlq_quarantine_src WHERE quarantined_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

panels.title: Ingest vs Batch Anomaly Agreement Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, agreement_pct FROM (SELECT toStartOfHour(validated_at) AS time, countIf(agreement = 'CONFIRMED') / greatest(toFloat64(count()), 1.0) * 100 AS agreement_pct FROM network_health.anomaly_validation WHERE validated_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT toStartOfHour(now()) AS time, 0.0 AS agreement_pct) ORDER BY time

SELECT toFloat64(countIf(quarantine_resolution = 'PROMOTED_TO_SILVER')) / greatest(toFloat64(countIf(reprocessed = 1)), 1.0) * 100 AS reprocess_success_pct FROM network_health.silver_dlq_quarantine_src

SELECT toFloat64(countIf(agreement = 'FALSE_POSITIVE')) / greatest(toFloat64(count()), 1.0) * 100 AS false_positive_pct FROM network_health.anomaly_validation WHERE validated_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
